mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM product p WHERE p.merchant_id = 1 AND p.is_deleted = 0 AND p.status = 1 AND p.stock_quantity <= p.stock_warn_threshold

SELECT p.id AS product_id, p.product_no, p.product_name, p.stock_quantity, p.stock_warn_threshold, p.status FROM product p WHERE p.merchant_id = 1 AND p.is_deleted = 0 AND p.status = 1 AND p.stock_quantity <= p.stock_warn_threshold ORDER BY p.stock_quantity ASC, p.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM inventory_record ir WHERE

SELECT ir.id, ir.record_no, ir.product_id, p.product_no, p.product_name, ir.biz_type, ir.biz_no, ir.change_qty, ir.stock_before, ir.stock_after, ir.operator_id, ir.operate_time, ir.remark FROM inventory_record ir LEFT JOIN product p ON p.id = ir.product_id WHERE ORDER BY ir.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT * FROM product WHERE id = #{productId} AND merchant_id = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET stock_quantity = #{stockQuantity}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{productId} AND merchant_id = 1 AND is_deleted = 0
